supporting_evidence: All 5 violating records have special_approval=0, confirming no exemption from monthly caps
opposing_evidence: R900001 and R900002 share invoice FPDEV900001 — potential Article 10 (duplicate invoice) violation, but this is a separate rule from the monthly cap task; both records exist as approved in the system
exceptions_or_boundaries: DEV-007-A2 (650 vs 600): near-boundary case with 50元 excess; reviewed detail shows special_approval=0 and no exemption field set, confirming violation
rationale: All three anomaly findings are confirmed. No special approvals or exemptions found for any violating record. The invoice reuse between R900001/R900002 is a separate Article 10 concern outside the current monthly-cap scope. All records are at face value in the database.
